---
title: "Facial contrast is a cue for perceiving health from the face"
authors: "Russell, R., Porcheron, A., Sweda, J., Jones, A. L., Mauger, E., & Morizot, F."
year: 2016
date: 2016-01-01
pub-journal: "Journal of Experimental Psychology: Human Perception and Performance"
volume: "42(9)"
pages: "1354–1362"
doi: "10.1037/xhp0000219"
pdf: "assets/papers/2016/russell_etal_2016.pdf"
categories: [first-impressions]
---
